title: crotalaria steudneri
intro: Crotalaria steudneri, also known as Steudner's rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria steudneri include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent to reduce swelling and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
